leadership.founders_experience: The founding team includes AI researchers and engineers with backgrounds in computer vision, deep learning, and enterprise software. The CEO, Joseph Nelson, previously co-founded Roboflow, a computer vision platform, and has experience in scaling AI startups. The CTO has a strong academic and industry background in machine learning and video analytics.

product_maturity.deployment_scale: Pilot deployments in retail and smart city sectors; enterprise production usage in select cases. Platform supports real-time video processing at scale.

primary_use_cases: Automated video analytics for retail (e.g., foot traffic, customer behavior)

integration_requirements: Video ingestion pipelines (RTSP, IP cameras, cloud storage)
delivery_feasibility.notes: Solution requires integration with existing video infrastructure and cloud environments. Documentation and APIs appear robust, but customization may be needed for specific enterprise use cases. Partner-led implementation is feasible with proper training.

commercial_viability.gtm_model: Direct sales and partner-led (focus on enterprise and channel partners)
commercial_viability.notes: Company demonstrates openness to partnerships, particularly with system integrators and industry-specific resellers. Pricing is not publicly disclosed, suggesting a custom enterprise sales motion. Revenue signals indicate traction in retail and smart city sectors.
